title: chrysocephalum apiculatum subsp. yorkense
intro: Chrysocephalum apiculatum subsp. yorkense is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family, commonly known as York grevillea or York yellow buttons. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Chrysocephalum apiculatum subsp. yorkense include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infused oils for use in traditional medicine, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
